mapper.select: SELECT /* @SQLID=FCT023#SQL001 */ M_F_NAME as fundOfficalName, M_F_TANI as basePriceUnit, M_F_H_MINKUCHI as numberOfSalesMinimum, M_F_H_MINTANI2 as salesMinimunUnitPriceAfter2nd, M_F_H_KUCHISU as numberOfSalesUnit, M_F_H_BSTANI2 as salesTradingUnitPriceAfter2nd, M_F_K_KUCHISU as numberOfCancelTradingUnit, M_F_K_BSTANI2 as cancelTradingUnitPriceAfter2nd, M_F_SHIMEKIRI as orderDeadlineTime, M_F_SELL_WAY as saleMethod, M_F_TYPE as fundType, M_F_SAITOUSHI_KUBUN as reinvestmentDivison, M_F_TOKUSYU as specialType FROM FUND WHERE M_F_TYPE in ('1','2') AND M_F_DELFLG = '0' AND M_F_ET_START_DATE <= IFA_DATE_UTIL.IFA_GET_SDATE('YYYYMMDD') AND M_F_NRICODE = #{sql001Req.nriCd}
